meta.note: BRAIN levels 1-3: library -> module -> subfield. Wikidata concepts attach at their altitude; Lean decls are the leaves; arXiv informal statements attach beside their matched decls. Nodes > split_threshold split one more path component recursively; decls sitting directly on a split node are its n_direct (and a direct:true subfield row).
